title: rhododendron germanicum var. ferrugineum
intro: Rhododendron germanicum var. ferrugineum, also known as the German rhododendron, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the heath family, Ericaceae. It is a shrub with leaves that have a rust-colored underside and produces showy white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been attributed to its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and reduce swelling. Rhododendron germanicum var. ferrugineum can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and its herbal preparations are said to have health benefits such as relieving respiratory issues and promoting wound healing.
